title: hieracium calvifolium
intro: Hieracium calvifolium, also known as mountain hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium calvifolium include its potential to treat kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often recommending a dosage of 1-2 teaspoons of dried root per cup of boiling water.
